summary: Iteration 39 - Footer Navigation Admin Feature Testing COMPLETE. Found and FIXED a backend bug where footer_menu_items was not being saved to DB. All Footer Navigation features tested and working correctly after fix.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Added footer_menu_items and footer_show_programs fields to SiteSettings model in models.py
FIXED: Added footer_menu_items and footer_show_programs to SiteSettingsUpdate model
FIXED: Added footer_menu_items handling in site_settings.py update_settings function
Console warning: '<span> cannot be child of <option>' in HeaderFooterTab.jsx dropdown - cosmetic issue only
context_for_next_testing_agent: Footer Navigation feature is fully working. Settings are saved to footer_menu_items array in DB. Both header and footer read from same array and filter by visible property.

admin_footer_nav_sub_tab.testid: footer-nav-panel appears in Header & Footer > Footer Navigation

admin_add_link_button.behavior: Adds new menu item to list

admin_visibility_toggle.behavior: Toggle ON/OFF correctly persists to DB and hides/shows in public site

footer_hidden_items.behavior: Items with visible=false do not appear in footer

header_hidden_items.behavior: Items with visible=false do not appear in header

footer_menu_items_not_saving.root_cause: footer_menu_items and footer_show_programs fields were missing from SiteSettings and SiteSettingsUpdate models in backend/models.py
footer_menu_items_not_saving.fix: Added both fields to SiteSettings model with defaults and to SiteSettingsUpdate with Optional types. Also added explicit handling in site_settings.py update function.
footer_menu_items_not_saving.verification: Tested toggle visibility, save, and verified API returns saved data. Public footer/header correctly hide items with visible=false
